inputs.label: Turkey Weight
inputs.businessContext: Net weight of the turkey before cooking, without giblets.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net weight of the turkey before cooking, without giblets.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pişirmeden önce hindinin sakatatsız net ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nettogewicht des Truthahns vor dem Garen, ohne Innereien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids net de la dinde avant cuisson, sans abats.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso neto del pavo antes de cocinar, sin menudencias.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوزن الصافي للديك الرومي قبل الطهي، بدون الأحشاء.

inputs.label: Oven Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Set temperature of the oven. Standard roasting temperature is 175°C (350°F).

businessContext_i18n.en: Set temperature of the oven. Standard roasting temperature is 175°C (350°F).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fırının ayarlanan sıcaklığı. Standart kızartma sıcaklığı 175°C'dir (350°F).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température réglée du four. La température de rôtissage standard est de 175°C (350°F).
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura establecida del horno. La temperatura de asado estándar es 175°C (350°F).
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة الفرن المضبوطة. درجة حرارة التحميص القياسية هي 175°م (350°ف).

inputs.label: Stuffed
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether the turkey cavity is filled with stuffing. Stuffed turkeys require longer cooking to ensure safe internal temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates whether the turkey cavity is filled with stuffing. Stuffed turkeys require longer cooking to ensure safe internal temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hindi boşluğunun iç harçla doldurulup doldurulmadığını belirtir. Doldurulmuş hindiler, güvenli iç sıcaklığa ulaşmak için daha uzun pişirme süresi gerektirir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob die Truthahnhöhle mit Füllung gefüllt ist. Gefüllte Truthähne benötigen eine längere Garzeit, um eine sichere Innentemperatur zu gewährleisten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indique si la cavité de la dinde est remplie de farce. Les dindes farcies nécessitent une cuisson plus longue pour garantir une température interne sûre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Indica si la cavidad del pavo está llena de relleno. Los pavos rellenos requieren una cocción más larga para garantizar una temperatura interna segura.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يشير إلى ما إذا كان تجويف الديك الرومي مملوءًا بالحشوة. يتطلب الديك الرومي المحشو وقت طهي أطول لضمان درجة حرارة داخلية آمنة.

inputs.label: Starting Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Initial temperature of the turkey. Typically refrigerated at 4°C.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial temperature of the turkey. Typically refrigerated at 4°C.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anfangstemperatur des Truthahns. Typischerweise gekühlt bei 4°C.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température initiale de la dinde. Généralement réfrigérée à 4°C.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura inicial del pavo. Normalmente refrigerado a 4°C.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة الديك الرومي الأولية. عادة ما تكون مبردة عند 4°م.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
